race.description: Souths Sports Club Fillies And Mares Mdn Plate
race.comment: LA BARRITA (10) showed ability placing at Warwick Farm on debut before not measuring up in Listed company here last time out. Sure to find this assignment much more to her liking and gets the services of Thompson in the irons. Looks the one they all have to run down. BOTTLES OF SHELLS (3) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration for a race of this nature. Revved up for this with a recent trial victory and looms as the main danger. HAD IT ALL (5) is another recent trial winner who may run a race while fresh. ARCTIC BRIGHT (2) closed off nicely when beaten 0.9 lengths last time here. Can contest for a place.
